message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classTitle "C"
skinparam interfaceTitle "I"
skinparam actorTitle "I"
skinparam stereotypeTitle "E"

class Game {
    +clock_t start
    +clock_t end
    +int curLevel
    +{const}int MAX_LEVEL
    +bool isFinish
    +bool isQuit
    +Session* curSession
    +handleCmd(char)
    +handleStartCmd(char)
    +initSession()
    +startSession()
    +endSession()
    +start()
    +isFinish()
    +getDuration()
}

class Session {
    +level
    +map
    +step
    +isFinish
    +move(Direction)
    +getMap()
    +finish()
    +isFinish()
    +getLevel()
    +backToPreviousPlace()
    +restart()
}

class Map {
    +width:int
    +height:int
    +tiles:TileMap
    +MovableList:vector
    +player:Player
    +Tile:OUT_SIDE_TILE
    +getTile()
    +moveBox()
    +getWidth()
    +getHeight()
    +initMap(const string&)
    +getStateOf(const Position&)
    +getBoxes()
    +getPlayerPosition()
    +back()
}

class Player {
    +move(Direction)
    +getPreviousDirection()
    +getPreviousPushFlag()
    +clear()
}

class Box {
    +onTarget:bool
    +moveToTile(TileType)
    +getOnTarget()
}

class Moveable {
    +position:Position
    +state:
    +{virtual}move(Direction)
    +back(Direction)
    +getPosition()
    +setPosition(const Position&)
}

class Tile {
    +position:Position
    +type:TileType
    +flag:TileFlag
    +setPosition(const Position&)
    +getPosition()
    +setFlag(TileFlag)
    +getType()
    +getState()
}

class Position {
    +x:int
    +y:int
    +DIRS
    +operator==(const Position&)
    +operator+=(const Position&)
    +getX()
    +getY()
    +of(int,int)
}

class Rule {
    +isWin(const Map&)
    +isRightMove(const Map&, Direction)
}

class MapRepository {
    +MAP_PATH:string
    +MAP_DIR:string
    +MAP_ID:enum
    +MapBuffer:class
    +getMap(MAP_ID)
}

class FileUtil {
    +readFile()
}

class Viewer {
    +getInput()
    +getLevel()
    +display()
}

class State {
    +FLOOR_OUT_SIDE
    +WALL
    +FLOOR
    +BOX
    +TARGET
    +PLAYER
    +BOX_ON_TARGET
}

class TileType {
    +WALL
    +FLOOR
    +TARGET
}

class TileFlag {
    +NULL
    +PLAYER
    +BOX
}

class Directory {
    +UP
    +DOWN
    +LEFT
    +RIGHT
    +SITU
}

Game --> Session
Session --> Map
Map --> Player
Map --> Box
Map --> Tile
Map --> Moveable
Map --> Rule
Map --> FileUtil
MapRepository --> FileUtil
MapRepository --> Map
MapRepository --> Map
FileUtil --> Map
Rule --> Map
Viewer --> Game
State --> TileType
TileType --> TileFlag
Directory --> TileFlag
TileFlag --> State
@enduml
